main_issue: Uses the trading (paper) host for market data: GET https://paper-api.alpaca.markets/v2/stocks/AAPL/trades/latest returns 404. Latest trade must be fetched from the data host, e.g., https://data.alpaca.markets/v2/stocks/AAPL/trades/latest.
Judge request failed: Expecting value: line 173 column 1 (char 946)
Does not strictly enforce that ALPACA_PAPER_ENDPOINT equals the paper URL; relies on the environment value, which could allow misconfiguration.
